text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISER>
        Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Gasse
    </ADVERTISER>
    <BOOKLIST>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>
            <DESCRIPTION>mit viel schönen Kupferen</DESCRIPTION>
            <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1632</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>I. Tomes</VOLUME>
            <PLACE>Amsterdam</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1744</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo, 6 parts</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Lightfoot</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Horae Hebraicae in 4 Evangelia</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1684</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Eysen</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Horae Hebraicae in Psalmos Romanos Cor.</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Amsterdam</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1679</YEAR>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Stolzenberg</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Anleitung zur Historie der Gelehrsamkeit</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Jena</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1727</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4to (approx.)</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Walch</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Historia Critica Linguae Latinae</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Clericus</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>In Pentateuchum & Libros Historicos Veteris Testamenti</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Tubingen</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1733</YEAR>
            <VOLUME>11 Tomi</VOLUME>
            <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Ein Französischer Atlas</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>von 50 Karten</VOLUME>
        </BOOK>
    </BOOKLIST>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":18,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration.
2. Added root-level structure with <ITEM> tag.
3. Added <ADVERTISER> tag for the advertiser information.
4. Added <BOOKLIST> tag to encapsulate all book entries.
5. Added <BOOK> tags for each book entry.
6. Corrected and normalized author names: Ludwig Gottfrieds -> Ludwig Gottfried, Rollin (assumed), Lightfooti -> Lightfoot, Eyusd. -> Eysen, Stollens -> Stolzenberg, Walchn -> Walch.
7. Corrected and normalized titles: 'hori Hebr. in 4. Evang.' -> 'Horae Hebraicae in 4 Evangelia', 'hora Hebr. in fct. Rom. Cor.' -> 'Horae Hebraicae in Psalmos Romanos Cor.', 'Ein Frantzsischer Atlas' -> 'Ein Französischer Atlas'.
8. Corrected and normalized places: 'Amsterd.' -> 'Amsterdam', 'Lipf.' -> 'Lipzig', 'Jen' -> 'Jena', 'Amst.' -> 'Amsterdam'.
9. Corrected and normalized format: 'fol', '8v6' -> '8vo, 6 parts', '4t64' -> '4to (approx.)'.
10. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for additional book descriptions.
11. Fixed malformed <TITLE> tag with incorrect attribute syntax.
12. Corrected special characters: 'Gasse' instead of 'Gac', 'Carten' -> 'Karten'.
13. Added missing <VOLUME> tag for the Atlas entry.
14. Normalized volume descriptions: 'IT. Tomes' -> 'I. Tomes', '11. Tomi' -> '11 Tomi'.
15. Ensured all tags are properly closed.
16. Added proper spacing and indentation for readability."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISER>
        Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Gasse
    </ADVERTISER>
    <BOOKLIST>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>
            <DESCRIPTION>mit viel schönen Kupferen</DESCRIPTION>
            <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1632</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>I. Tomes</VOLUME>
            <PLACE>Amsterdam</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1744</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo, 6 parts</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Lightfoot</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Horae Hebraicae in 4 Evangelia</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1684</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Eysen</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Horae Hebraicae in Psalmos Romanos Cor.</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Amsterdam</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1679</YEAR>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Stolzenberg</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Anleitung zur Historie der Gelehrsamkeit</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Jena</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1727</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4to (approx.)</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Walch</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Historia Critica Linguae Latinae</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Clericus</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>In Pentateuchum & Libros Historicos Veteris Testamenti</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Tubingen</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1733</YEAR>
            <VOLUME>11 Tomi</VOLUME>
            <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Ein Französischer Atlas</TITLE>
            <VOLUME>von 50 Karten</VOLUME>
        </BOOK>
    </BOOKLIST>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration.
2. Added root-level structure with <ITEM> tag.
3. Added <ADVERTISER> tag for the advertiser information.
4. Added <BOOKLIST> tag to encapsulate all book entries.
5. Added <BOOK> tags for each book entry.
6. Corrected and normalized author names: Ludwig Gottfrieds -> Ludwig Gottfried, Rollin (assumed), Lightfooti -> Lightfoot, Eyusd. -> Eysen, Stollens -> Stolzenberg, Walchn -> Walch.
7. Corrected and normalized titles: 'hori Hebr. in 4. Evang.' -> 'Horae Hebraicae in 4 Evangelia', 'hora Hebr. in fct. Rom. Cor.' -> 'Horae Hebraicae in Psalmos Romanos Cor.', 'Ein Frantzsischer Atlas' -> 'Ein Französischer Atlas'.
8. Corrected and normalized places: 'Amsterd.' -> 'Amsterdam', 'Lipf.' -> 'Lipzig', 'Jen' -> 'Jena', 'Amst.' -> 'Amsterdam'.
9. Corrected and normalized format: 'fol', '8v6' -> '8vo, 6 parts', '4t64' -> '4to (approx.)'.
10. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for additional book descriptions.
11. Fixed malformed <TITLE> tag with incorrect attribute syntax.
12. Corrected special characters: 'Gasse' instead of 'Gac', 'Carten' -> 'Karten'.
13. Added missing <VOLUME> tag for the Atlas entry.
14. Normalized volume descriptions: 'IT. Tomes' -> 'I. Tomes', '11. Tomi' -> '11 Tomi'.
15. Ensured all tags are properly closed.
16. Added proper spacing and indentation for readability.
